text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan, thanks for giving me that present.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was shocked though... You must know your stuff
to find a body mist that fancy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, I wanted to get something special for
the occasion. I had to go to a nice boutique.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, want to go there with me next time?
They have all kinds of interesting things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know it's pretty hard to figure out that
stuff, but maybe we could help each other learn...
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And, hey, if you're there with me, I wouldn't feel
so awkward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're right. I'd feel better having you with
me too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Awesome, let's do it! This weekend, we're going
shopping!
